project_privacy_data_flows.description: Places feature requests device location via MapLibre LocationComponent. GPS coordinates used to fetch nearby Wikipedia articles via GeoSearch API. Location is not stored on server but sent as query parameter.

flow_steps.details: On first launch, requests ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION and ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION permissions from user.

flow_steps.code: @SuppressLint("MissingPermission") private fun startLocationTracking() { mapboxMap?.let { it.locationComponent.activateLocationComponent(LocationComponentActivationOptions.builder(requireContext(), it.style!!).build()); it.locationComponent.isLocationComponentEnabled = true } }
flow_steps.details: MapLibre LocationComponent activated to receive GPS location updates. Camera mode set to NONE (manual control).

flow_steps.code: private fun getLastKnownUserLocation(): Location? { return if (mapboxMap?.locationComponent?.isLocationComponentActivated == true) mapboxMap?.locationComponent?.lastKnownLocation else null }
flow_steps.details: Retrieves last known device location from MapLibre's location component.

flow_steps.code: fun fetchNearbyPages(latitude: Double, longitude: Double, radius: Int, maxResults: Int) { ... val response = ServiceFactory.get(wikiSite).getGeoSearch("$latitude|$longitude", radius, maxResults, maxResults) }
flow_steps.details: GPS coordinates formatted as "latitude|longitude" string and sent to Wikipedia GeoSearch API with configurable radius.

flow_steps.code: @GET(MW_API_PREFIX + "action=query&generator=geosearch&prop=coordinates|description|pageimages|info") suspend fun getGeoSearch(@Query("ggscoord", encoded = true) coordinates: String, @Query("ggsradius") radius: Int, @Query("ggslimit") ggsLimit: Int, @Query("colimit") coLimit: Int)
flow_steps.details: Coordinates sent to MediaWiki geosearch API. Server returns nearby Wikipedia articles with their coordinates and descriptions.
User can manually trigger location acquisition by tapping the 'my location' button.
Returned article locations rendered as markers on MapLibre map. User location shown on map but not persisted to server.
